title: cephalocarpus neblinensis
intro: Cephalocarpus neblinensis, also known as the Neblina tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Podocarpaceae. Native to the Amazon rainforest, this plant has been used by indigenous communities for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cephalocarpus neblinensis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable asset in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Cephalocarpus neblinensis can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
